mapper.select:
/* selectTmaCommonDestList */ select MP.PTNRKEY , MD.DESTKEY , MD.DENAMLC from MDESMA MD left outer join MPTNMA MP on MP.COMPKEY = MD.COMPKEY and MP.PTNRKEY = MD.PTNRKEY where MD.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and MD.DEUSEYN = 'Y' and MP.PTNRTYP = 'CUSTOMER' and MP.PTUSEYN = 'Y'
and MD.PTNRKEY = #{ptnrkey}

/* selectTmaCommonCustList */ select PTNRKEY , PTNAMLC as CUSTKEY , concat('[', PTNRKEY, ']', PTNAMLC) as PTNAMLC from MPTNMA where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and PTNRTYP = 'CUSTOMER' and PTUSEYN = 'Y'
/* tma02GetPostdat */ select DATE_FORMAT(fn_wm_posdate(#{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}), '%Y-%m-%d') as postdat from dual

/* selectTma02SkuwcList */ select MS.COMPKEY as COMPKEY , MS.WAREKEY as WAREKEY , MS.OWNERKY as OWNERKY , MS.SKUMKEY as SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC as SKUDESC , MS.SKUSKEY as SKUSKEY , MS.SUOMKEY as SUOMKEY , case when MS.SKUSTAT = 'OUT' then 'Y' else 'N' end as SKUSTAT , MS.PACKKEY as PACKKEY , MP.TRUNTYP as TRUNTYP , IFNULL(MP.PACKQTY, 0) as PACKQTY , IFNULL(ST.STOTQTY , 0) as STOTQTY , concat('[', MS.SKUMKEY, ']', MS.SKUDESC, ' (', ifnull(ST.STOTQTY , 0), ')') as OCOSKUM from MSKUWC MS left join ( select COMPKEY, OWNERKY, WAREKEY , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , LOTAT17, LOTAT18, LOTAT19, LOTAT20 , (sum(STOTQTY)- sum(SBLOQTY)) as STOTQTY from WSTKKY where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and AREAKEY = 'STG' and SALLQTY = 0 and SINBQTY = 0 and SOUBQTY = 0 group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY , LOTAT17, LOTAT18, LOTAT19, LOTAT20 ) ST on ST.COMPKEY = MS.COMPKEY and ST.WAREKEY = MS.WAREKEY and ST.OWNERKY = MS.OWNERKY and ST.SKUMKEY = MS.SKUMKEY left join MPAKMA MP on MP.COMPKEY = MS.COMPKEY and MP.WAREKEY = MS.WAREKEY and MP.PACKKEY = MS.PACKKEY and MP.TRUNTYP = MS.TRUNTYP and MP.PKUSEYN = 'Y' where MS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and MS.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and MS.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and MS.SKUSTAT = 'PRODUCT' group by MS.SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC order by MS.SKUDESC
mapper.insert: /* insertTma02Ocosal */ insert into OCOSAL( COMPKEY, COOUTKY, COOUTIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, POSTDAT, SALDATE, SALTIME, TOWARKY, CUSTKEY, SALRQDT, SALRQTM, DESTKEY, OWNERKY, SAATC03, SKUSKEY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SOITQTY, RGITQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY, SALSTAT, SAATC05, SAATC10, SAATC06, SAATC08, SAATC07, SAATC01, SALMEMO, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey}, #{cooutky}, FN_OM_COOUTIT(#{userData.compkey}, #{cooutky}), #{doccate}, #{doctype}, DATE_FORMAT(#{postdat},'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{towarky}, #{custkey}, DATE_FORMAT(#{salrqdt},'%Y%m%d'), ifnull(replace(#{salrqtm},':',''), ''), #{destkey}, #{ownerky}, ifnull(#{saatc03}, ''), ifnull(#{skuskey}, ''), #{skumkey}, #{skudesc}, #{rgitqty}, #{rgitqty}, #{shcfqty}, #{suomkey}, #{salstat}, ifnull(#{saatc05}, ''), ifnull(#{saatc10}, ''), ifnull(#{saatc06}, #{cooutky}), ifnull(#{saatc08}, ''), ifnull(#{saatc07}, ''), ifnull(#{saatc01}, ''), #{salmemo}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: /* selectTma06Vhplnky */ select fn_tm_vhplnky() as VHPLNKY from dual
